title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Capgemini India Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Capgemini India Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Capgemini India Consulting Pvt Ltd, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Hyderabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Capgemini India Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Capgemini India Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Capgemini India Consulting Pvt Ltd!
